description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in casual, sporty attire. He wears a short-sleeved shirt, long pants that are rolled up at the cuffs, and fingerless gloves. A crossbody strap runs from his right shoulder to his left hip, attached to a backpack worn on his back. He has a headset with a microphone and a cap, and his footwear consists of athletic slip-on shoes with visible socks. The figure's build is lean and athletic, and his posture is upright and relaxed, suggesting readiness for movement.
description: A lean adult male in sporty casual clothing with a backpack, headset, and cap, standing upright and ready for action.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, headset, cap, crossbody strap, gloves, and full front of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, headset, backpack, and the rolled-up pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backpack, crossbody strap, and back of the head and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the headset microphone, backpack, and the side profile of the gloves and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt, rolled-up pants, fingerless gloves, and a cap with a headset
